version.description: Quote it in YAML — 1.0 unquoted parses as a number.

include.description: Flowgroup YAML files to include, relative to pipelines/.

items.description: Glob pattern for files to include (e.g., 'bronze_*.yaml', 'silver/**/*.yaml')
Glob pattern for blueprint files to include

instance_include.description: Blueprint instance files to include (default ['pipelines/**/*.yaml']); routed by content shape, so overlapping with include is safe.

items.description: Glob pattern for instance files to include

required_lhp_version.description: PEP 440 specifier the CLI enforces before generating (e.g. >=0.9,<1.0).

oneOf.description: Shorthand: a bare string is the Spark SQL expression for the column

expression.description: Spark SQL expression for the column

applies_to.description: Target types the column is added to (default: streaming_table, materialized_view).

additional_imports.description: Import lines the expression needs in the generated file.

oneOf.description: Shorthand: a bare list is the list of column names in this preset

columns.description: Column names this preset selects — each must be defined above.

defaults.description: Default metadata selection applied when a flowgroup does not choose.

event_log.description: Project-level event log configuration for pipeline resources

enabled.description: Whether project-level event logging is enabled

catalog.description: Catalog for event log tables (supports LHP substitution tokens); required while event_log is enabled.

schema.description: Schema for event log tables (supports LHP substitution tokens); required while event_log is enabled.

name_prefix.description: Prefix prepended to pipeline name for event log table name

name_suffix.description: Suffix appended to pipeline name for event log table name

monitoring.description: Event log monitoring pipeline configuration. Generates a notebook with N independent streaming queries plus a SDP pipeline with materialized views. A Databricks Workflow job chains the two.

enabled.description: Whether the monitoring pipeline is enabled

streaming_table.description: Name of the user-created Delta table that event log streams write into

checkpoint_path.description: Base path for streaming checkpoints ({checkpoint_path}/{pipeline_name}/ per pipeline). Required while monitoring is enabled.

job_config_path.description: Relative path to the dedicated monitoring job config YAML; required while monitoring is enabled.

max_concurrent_streams.description: Maximum number of concurrent streaming queries in the union notebook (ThreadPoolExecutor max_workers)

materialized_views.description: List of materialized views to create from the unified event log Delta table

sql.description: Inline SQL body — leave empty when using a SQL file path.

sql_path.description: Project-relative .sql file — mutually exclusive with inline SQL.

enable_job_monitoring.description: Also monitor orchestration job runs, not just pipelines — via Databricks SDK, adds a jobs_stats materialized view.

uc_tagging.description: Unity Catalog tagging configuration. On by default — this block is optional and only needed to disable the feature or tune it. Users opt in by declaring 'tags' on a table/column; the generated per-pipeline _uc_tagging_hook.py then applies them via the Entity Tag Assignments REST API on pipeline update progress events.

enabled.description: Whether UC tagging is enabled. Defaults to true (on by default, even with no uc_tagging block). Set false to disable the feature entirely.

remove_undeclared_tags.description: Also delete tags that exist in UC but not in the YAML (can remove tags set by other tools).

tag_update_concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent tag operations (the hook's ThreadPoolExecutor max_workers for the one-shot pass over all tables/columns).

test_reporting.description: Test-result reporting configuration. Points at a user-supplied Python callable that publishes test results.

module_path.description: Python module containing the report hook (required).

config_file.description: Optional YAML passed to the hook.

wheel.description: Per-project wheel packaging configuration (used by pipelines with packaging: wheel)

artifact_volume.description: Unity Catalog volume path the built wheel is uploaded to; supports substitution tokens, and the /Volumes/... shape is validated post-substitution.

sandbox.description: Team-level developer-sandbox policy for lhp generate --sandbox

strategy.description: How sandbox output is isolated — only table renaming exists today.

table_pattern.description: Must contain {namespace} and {table}; literal text limited to letters, digits, and underscores.

allowed_envs.description: Environments where sandbox mode may run. Omit to allow every environment; an empty list is rejected.

apply_formatting.description: Run the code-formatting pass over generated Python files. The AST-parse validity guard (LHP-CFG-031) always runs; --no-format overrides this.
